creator: bofh@freebsd.org
text:
Those are version 0.80 and the maintainer requested someone to take over and upgrade in the mailing list. I have accumulated all the security/sguil-server, security/sguil-client and security/sguil-sensor in a single port and upgraded to 0.9.0.

(In reply to John Marino from comment #3)
> How does this differ from security/sguil-client and security/sguil-server
> which already exist and have upgrade PRs?
